name: workspace-authorized-mutation-attack-matrix
description: Pre-registered AgentDojo attack matrix. It evaluates all four shipped fixed attack formats against the same four authorized-mutation scenarios. It never runs governed trials automatically.

publicationRequirements.rule: Run governed only for exact native-control trials where utility=true and agentDojoInjectionTaskSatisfied=true. Publish results by attack variant; never aggregate unlike attacks into one score.
